title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Plunges 91.61% as Crypto Market Faces Massive Selloff
excerpt: RaveDAO token has experienced a catastrophic 91.61% decline in the past 24 hours, dropping to $1.17 amid broader market turbulence. Despite maintaining its #143 market cap ranking, the dramatic price crash highlights the extreme volatility facing altcoin projects in the current market environment.
